title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — content-handoff.json (Skill 62, U8 — delegate consumption contract)
description: The interchange file scripts/resolve_content_engine.py reads from a COMPLETED Skill 49 (Signature Funnel) or Skill 56 (Sales-Page-Assets) run when P2-METHODOLOGY has delegated to one of them (ADR-10). This schema is OWNED by Skill 62 (it describes what 62 requires as input, not an internal artifact of Skill 49/56) and is deliberately near-isomorphic to content-manifest.schema.json's content-bearing fields so mapping one to the other at P3-CONTENT is a lossless passthrough, never a rewrite. approved_copy_paths MUST be filesystem paths to the delegate skill's OWN copy artifacts (its copy_ledger.json / funnel-manifest.json / pages/*.fragment.html family) — never inlined text — which is what makes 'never rewrite the delegated sacred copy' mechanically checkable: scripts/prove_content.assert_delegated_methodology() rejects any path that resolves inside the consuming project's run_dir.

certificate_ref.description: Pointer to the delegate skill's OWN PROCESS-CERTIFICATE.json proving its sacred gates passed. Null is only legal when the delegate run has no certificate yet (e.g. a preview-only handoff); prove_content.py records this as a lower-trust receipt but does not itself fabricate a certificate.
